name: Rejecting a member with invalid name that is too long
title: Rejecting a member with invalid name that is too long

testSteps.description: Given a member administrator with valid permissions
And the required member creation context is set up

children.description: Setup member creation context for "Default Member" with specified permissions

testSteps.description: Given an invalid member name that is too long
When I attempt to create a member with the invalid name

children.description: Attempt to create member with invalid name (201 characters)

testSteps.description: Then the member creation should fail
And the error should indicate the member name is too long

userStory.narrative:
As a member administrator
I want to create and manage members
So that users can join communities and have profiles
